notOnPC.header: Reminders be not workin' on this here land-lubber's PC
notOnPC.content: Howbeit, since ye may haul the booty off this PC and onto a phone or Mac, ye can organize yer reminders here.

triggeringEvent.title: The event what starts it
triggeringEvent.addedToFront: After a matey's been added to the front
triggeringEvent.removedFromFront: After a matey's been tossed from the front

delete.title: Scuttle the reminder
delete.confirm: Be ye certain ye want to scuttle this here reminder?
